title: Project Horrific
body:
I know you wanna make content, You know you wanna make content, everybody knows you wanna make content. So, here is a Modpack for you.

# Project Horror
Step into a world where every shadow hides a danger and every sound could be your last. Project Horror is a horror-themed Minecraft modpack designed to challenge your wits, courage, and survival skills.

Explore a cursed land filled with terrifying monsters, haunted biomes, and eerie dungeons. Face unpredictable weather, limited resources, and the constant threat of the unknown. New mechanics like sanity, darkness, and evolving threats ensure that no two nights are ever the same.

Features:

**Chilling Atmosphere**: Enhanced visuals and sounds create an immersive and terrifying environment.

**Haunting Creatures**: Encounter a variety of nightmarish enemies, from spectral wraiths to grotesque beasts.

**Survival Mechanics**: Manage your sanity, light sources, and dwindling supplies to stay alive.

**Exploration and Mystery**: Discover haunted ruins, cursed artifacts, and lore that reveals the dark story of the world.

Can you endure the darkness and uncover the secrets of the Project Horror, or will the horrors consume you?
